parsedJson.summary: The website features a clean, modern aesthetic with good typography, but the lack of clear industry-specific imagery and a confusing primary call-to-action creates a disconnect for local customers seeking immediate roofing services.

issues.title: Hero image fails to show roofing services
issues.what_observed: The main hero image on the right shows a generic office reception desk with a 'Hurricane Digital' logo on the wall, rather than a roof, a construction site, or a technician.
issues.why_problem: A user searching for 'roofing Brisbane' expects to see roofs or workers immediately. Seeing an office desk makes them question if they are on the right site or if this is just a generic marketing agency that doesn't understand the trade. It breaks the immediate visual confirmation of the service.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A high-quality photo of a completed roof project, a team member in safety gear on a roof, or a split screen showing a 'before and after' of a roof repair.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the office reception image with a high-resolution, authentic photo of a roofing project or the team at work to instantly validate the service offering.
issues.plain_explanation: 网站的主图展示的是办公室前台，而不是屋顶或施工场景。对于寻找屋顶维修服务的客户来说，这让他们无法一眼确认你们就是做屋顶生意的。
issues.customer_impact: 访客在 8 秒内就会判断网站是否相关。如果第一眼没看到屋顶，他们可能会认为你们不专业或找错了地方，导致跳出率增加，直接损失潜在客户。

issues.title: Primary CTA is a form, not a phone number
issues.what_observed: The primary call-to-action (CTA) in the hero section is a text input field ('Enter Your Email Here') and a button for a 'Free Strategy Session'. There is no visible phone number in the main hero area.
issues.why_problem: Local service customers (especially for urgent needs like roofing) often want to call immediately. Forcing them to type an email address creates friction. They may feel the business is trying to 'sell' them a strategy session rather than just fixing their roof.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A prominent 'Call Now' button with a clickable phone number, or a 'Get a Free Quote' button that leads to a simple contact form, placed above the fold.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Replace the email input field with a large, high-contrast 'Call Now' button or a 'Get Instant Quote' button. Move the phone number to the top right of the hero section.
issues.plain_explanation: 主要按钮要求用户输入邮箱预约“策略会议”，而不是直接提供电话号码。对于急需修屋顶的客户来说，这增加了沟通的障碍，让他们觉得你们更想推销服务而不是解决问题。
issues.customer_impact: 本地搜索用户中，超过 50% 会在 30 分钟内拨打电话。如果找不到显眼的电话按钮，这些高意向客户可能会直接转向竞争对手，导致大量商机流失。

issues.title: Headline focuses on marketing, not the service
issues.what_observed: The headline reads 'Transform Your Local Business with Expert Digital Marketing' and 'Flood your Business with Partners'.
issues.why_problem: This language is aimed at business owners looking for marketing help, not homeowners looking for a roofer. It confuses the target audience. A homeowner doesn't care about 'digital marketing'; they care about a leak-free roof.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A headline that speaks directly to the customer's problem, e.g., 'Brisbane's Trusted Roofing Experts' or 'Fast, Reliable Roof Repairs in Brisbane'.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Rewrite the headline to focus on the roofing service and the location (Brisbane). Use clear, benefit-driven language like 'Protect Your Home with Brisbane's Top Roofing Team'.
issues.plain_explanation: 标题强调的是“数字营销”和“合作伙伴”，而不是屋顶服务。这让普通客户感到困惑，因为他们只想找修屋顶的人，而不是学习营销知识。
issues.customer_impact: 如果标题不能立刻说明你们提供什么服务，访客会感到迷茫并离开。清晰的标题能提高访客的停留时间和转化率，减少因误解而流失的客户。

issues.title: Lack of visible social proof in hero section
issues.what_observed: There are no star ratings, review snippets, or trust badges (like 'Licensed & Insured') visible in the main hero section.
issues.why_problem: Local customers rely heavily on reviews and trust signals before contacting a service provider. Without these visible immediately, the site feels less credible.
issues.what_correct_looks_like: A small section below the headline showing '4.9/5 Stars from 100+ Reviews' or a 'Licensed & Insured' badge.
issues.how_to_fix_in_redesign: Add a trust bar below the headline with star ratings, a snippet of a positive review, and relevant trust badges (e.g., Master Builder, Licensed).
issues.plain_explanation: 主区域没有展示客户评价或资质认证。对于本地服务来说，这些信任标志能迅速建立客户信心，让他们更愿意联系你们。
issues.customer_impact: 研究显示，带有评价和评分的网站转化率更高。缺少这些信任信号会让潜在客户犹豫，甚至转向有明确好评展示的竞争对手。

positive_observations: Clean, modern typography and color scheme that feels professional.
Clear navigation menu with logical categories.
Good use of white space, making the content easy to read.
redesign_priorities: 1. Replace the office hero image with a high-quality photo of a roofing project or team.
2. Change the primary CTA to a 'Call Now' or 'Get a Quote' button with a visible phone number.
3. Rewrite the headline to focus on roofing services in Brisbane, not digital marketing.
